# Quentin Dupard

> Independent consultant for B2B SaaS go-to-market strategy and global hiring advisory. 5+ years in international operations. 150+ EOR (Employer of Record) providers audited across all major regions. US legal entity, working with clients worldwide.

Quentin Dupard runs an independent consulting practice serving SaaS companies, HR tech platforms, fast-scaling international teams, and investors evaluating EOR / global payroll / HR tech targets. The practice is built on operator depth — every recommendation is grounded in pattern recognition from running global GTM motions and auditing hundreds of employment providers, not consulting templates.

Three focused service lines, scoped hourly, daily, or project-based. No referral fees, no vendor commissions, no retainer traps.

## Pages

- [Home](https://quentindupard.com/index.html): Practice overview, three service lines summary, background, process, and contact.
- [About](https://quentindupard.com/about.html): Full background, values, principles, and FAQ.
- [Services](https://quentindupard.com/services.html): Full service descriptions for GTM Strategy, Global Hiring, and EOR Due Diligence with engagement details.
- [Contact](https://quentindupard.com/contact.html): Contact form, email, and LinkedIn channels.

## Services

- **GTM Strategy for SaaS & Growth Teams**: Go-to-market strategy consulting for B2B SaaS — ICP definition, positioning, pricing, sales playbooks, and channel strategy. Best fit: Series A through C SaaS, HR tech, B2B platforms.
- **Global Hiring Consultant**: International workforce structure design, employment model assessment, cross-border compliance, and EOR / payroll vendor evaluation. No commissions, independent advisory.
- **EOR & HR Tech Market Due Diligence**: Specialist domain due diligence for PE / VC firms and strategic acquirers evaluating Employer of Record, global payroll, and HR tech targets. 2–4 week intensive, confidential.

## Contact

- Email: quentin.dupard@gmail.com
